name: wechat-pipeline
description: End-to-end WeChat Official Account draft pipeline with multi-agent formatting, pinned Baoyu image generation, gzh-design typesetting, validation, and publishing.

interface.shortDescription: Format, illustrate, validate, and publish WeChat drafts.
interface.longDescription: Runs a controlled multi-agent workflow from source text through native Baoyu image generation, gzh-design HTML typesetting, and WeChat Official Account draft creation.
defaultPrompt: 把这篇内容制作成微信贴图并发布到公众号草稿箱。
